gpt55_review_summary: Halley reviewed the initial diff with GPT-5.5 high reasoning and found no blocking issues, with one non-blocking fixture-hardening suggestion. That suggestion was resolved by making run names intentionally different from required purpose values. Halley re-reviewed the updated diff and approved merging if CI is green, with no remaining test gaps for this PR.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_pr_evidence.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 54 passed
poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Refactored strict V1 Databricks run-status test fixtures into table-driven helpers.
Added parametrized coverage for each missing strict Databricks purpose: V1 benchmark, storage-reader benchmark, and native engine probe.
Added strict-mode coverage for direct Databricks run-status records as well as databricks_runs get --summary wrapper records.
Added public and legacy release-bundle CLI help-text coverage for benchmark/storage/engine-probe Databricks status requirements.
why: The strict V1 release gate now relies on Databricks purpose coverage, so the tests should prove each accepted input shape and each missing-purpose failure explicitly.
